mainEntity.name: How much does post construction cleaning cost in Las Vegas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most post-construction cleaning in Las Vegas prices between $0.20 and $0.40 per square foot for a final clean. A 2,500 sq ft new build typically runs $500 to $1,000 depending on condition. Rough cleans are quoted lower; commercial or restaurant final cleans can run higher.

mainEntity.name: Do you clean during construction or only at the end?

acceptedAnswer.text: Both. We phase: rough clean during construction, final clean before handover, touch-up clean right before walkthrough. Book one or all three.

mainEntity.name: Are you insured for commercial construction sites?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We carry general liability and can provide a certificate of insurance to general contractors and property owners on request.

mainEntity.name: How fast can you turn around a final clean?

acceptedAnswer.text: For most homes and units, we can complete a final clean in one day with a two- or three-person crew. Larger commercial buildouts take 2 to 3 days. We give you a real timeline when we quote.

mainEntity.name: Do you remove construction debris and haul it away?

acceptedAnswer.text: We handle surface debris and bag it for haul. Large construction waste — pallets, drywall sheets, lumber — is a contractor or dumpster trade, not a cleaning trade. We can recommend local haulers if you need one.
